Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gold]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Gold is the final stage of any sacred artist’s Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — A Gold is someone who has mastered the secrets of madra beyond mortal dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Gold bodies are partially made of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Gold is a level of power that can be exceeded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The final step into Gold is harvesting a Remnant and binding it to the physical body.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — At the Gold stage, one holds a Remnant in their core and receives a Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Gold is a rank or status held by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Gold is a stage of progression for artists that causes physical changes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Gold is a stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Gold refers to a level of martial artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Gold is a stage or rank for sacred artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin has crossed the threshold to Gold stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Gold is a stage of spirit/body strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Gold is a rank or status held by Tash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Gold is a stage of advancement higher than Copper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin would find it impressive if Lindon hit Gold someday.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Gold is a standard of power or rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — When Lindon is ready to break through to Gold, Orthos can help him bridge the gap.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Gold is a stage or rank held by the young man on the ground.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The people of Sacred Valley believe Adama is a Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Gold is a level of power/stage.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Advancing to Gold requires a trial involving a library in the city.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos was a Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The vast majority of souls in Sacred Valley are Gold.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
